Manually award a gamification badge to a user.

get.description: Retrieve all tasks, optionally filtered by status with pagination.

Set custom ordering for all stages within a task.

Replace task-level link set with specified topics.

get.description: Retrieve flat list of all nodes (all statuses, all archive states).

post.description: Create a new topic node.

delete.description: Soft-archive a topic node and cascades to descendants.

get.description: Retrieve a single topic node with its direct children.

patch.description: Update metadata of a topic node.

post.description: Re-parent and/or reorder a topic node.

post.description: Request a presigned upload URL for media associated with a topic.

delete.description: Soft delete media from a topic node.

post.description: Mark media upload as complete and ready for use.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all users.

post.description: Create a new user with specified roles.

delete.description: Soft-delete a user by marking them inactive. Revokes all active refresh tokens.

409.description: Conflict / Self lockout or last admin protection triggered

get.description: Retrieve a single user by ID.

patch.description: Update metadata, status, or roles of a user. Prevents self-lockout or removing last active admin.

409.description: Conflict / Self lockout or last admin protection triggered

post.description: Admin-initiated password reset for a user.

get.description: Retrieve a list of topic node enrollments granted to a specific user.

post.description: Enroll a user in a specific topic node.

delete.description: Revoke enrollment from a user for a specific topic node, optionally cascading to descendants.

post.description: Activates a newly registered user account using the activation token.

400.description: Bad Request / Invalid or Expired Token

post.description: Initiates a password reset flow, sending an email if the account exists.

get.description: Redirects the user to Google's OAuth consent screen.
Processes Google's auth code, creates or logs in the user, and sets a session cookie.

302.description: Successfully authenticated, redirecting back to the web application

400.description: OAuth State Mismatch / Code verification failure

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password, setting a session cookie.
Logs out the user and clears the session cookie.
Rotates the session refresh token and returns a new access token.
Registers a new student account. Returns 202 Accepted on success.
Resets the password of a user using a valid password reset token.

400.description: Bad Request / Invalid or Expired Token

get.description: Returns a list of users with their XP and rank.
Retrieves the authenticated user's awarded badges.

200.description: Successfully retrieved badges (or null if empty)

post.description: Changes the password for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a comment. Only the author or an admin can delete a comment.

post.description: Toggles the liked state of a comment for the authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieves a aggregated summary of the user's gamification state (XP, streak, quests, missions, badges).
Retrieves the active missions and current progress for the authenticated user.

200.description: Successfully retrieved missions (or null if empty)

get.description: Retrieves the authenticated user's overall progress summary across topics and tasks.
Retrieves the progress details of all assigned/available tasks.
Retrieves the progress details of all enrolled topic subtrees.
Retrieves the daily quests and current progress for the authenticated user.
Retrieves the weekly quests and current progress for the authenticated user.
Retrieves the authenticated user's login streak information.

200.description: Successfully retrieved streak details (or null if empty)

post.description: Checks in (completes) a stage in a task, granting XP rewards and triggering streaking / gamification engines.

403.description: Forbidden / User not enrolled in the linked topic subtree

post.description: Marks a topic node as completed, triggering XP rewards, streak engine, quests, and badge evaluations.
Marks a topic node as visited, creating progress if it did not exist.

403.description: Forbidden / User not enrolled in topic subtree

get.description: Retrieves the authenticated user's total XP, level, and rank title.

200.description: Successfully retrieved XP details (or null if empty)

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all published tasks.
Retrieves a specific published task, including its stages and linked topics.
get.summary: Retrieve a single published task by ID

get.description: Retrieves a list of all published topic nodes, including their media and tags.

200.description: Successfully retrieved list of topic nodes

get.description: Retrieves a specific published topic node, including its media and tags.
get.summary: Retrieve a single published topic node by ID

get.description: Returns all comments on a topic node ordered top-level DESC then replies ASC. Requires enrollment.

403.description: Forbidden — user is not enrolled in this topic

post.description: Creates a top-level comment or a reply. Awards XP on success. Requires enrollment.

400.description: Bad request — malformed body, validation error, or nested reply forbidden

403.description: Forbidden — user is not enrolled in this topic

post.summary: Create a comment on a topic
